_comment: Served at runtime as /symbology-config.json (or via your API). Editing this file changes map symbology immediately for anyone who reloads the page, or instantly for connected users if your backend broadcasts a 'symbology-updated' socket event after saving (see useSymbologyLiveReload.js). No frontend rebuild or redeploy needed.

_longhaul_switched_to_lmp_example._comment: This is what management asking to switch Longhaul from fiber_type to lmp looks like: rename this key to 'longhaul' (replacing the block above) -- that's it. No code change. If lmp is a numeric loss value rather than a category, use class-breaks (min/max ranges) instead of unique-value, as shown here.

dc_odb._comment: Example for a point layer -- migrate DC.jsx into this shape the same way Longhaul was migrated.
